source_message: Oracle 06-15 NY-AM: user corrected the MES Trend long levels during fresh review. Stop must be the first FVG candle low 7626.50, not 7627.00; TP1 must be the H4 FVG first-candle high 7641.50, not the psych fallback 7640.00. Production fold now emits MES B Trend long 7630.5 / 7626.5 / 7641.5 at 11:24 ET. Outcome is stop_hit at 11:33 ET; corrected TP1 was reached later at 11:50 ET after stop. MNQ had no setup; pair leader was inconclusive/null. Preserve as an approved valid MES setup with losing/wickout outcome, not a no-trade row.

oracle_context.approval_note: User corrected levels on 2026-07-01: stop 7626.50 at first FVG candle low; TP1 7641.50 at H4 FVG first-candle high.

second_entry_review.current_engine_behavior: The first packet_ready latches the NY-AM session as primary taken; stop outcome does not reset that latch. A same-zone continuation was blocked at 11:26 ET before stop, and a later long was blocked after TP1 was already reached.
second_entry_review.future_design_question: Whether to allow a controlled retry after an early stop is a separate implementation/risk decision, not part of this oracle promotion.
